title: WhisperToggle
description: Toggle whisper chat to a selected player with /wt and a keybind.
body:
# WhisperToggle

**WhisperToggle** is a lightweight Fabric client-side mod for Minecraft that lets you toggle private message mode with a hotkey. Once active, all your chat messages will be automatically whispered to a chosen player. Instead of typing `/w [Player]` every time.

![Group chat conversation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb9101899845526978771793f23ada7a8062250.png)

## Features

-  Toggle whisper mode with a single keypress (`H` by default)
-  Automatically send chat messages as whispers to a selected player
-  Set your target with `/wt <player>`
-  Whisper status display above the chat bar when chat is open. So you're always sure its on!
- Group chats!

![Join a group chat by clicking in chat!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3e29c169678d0f1b25ba42aa2d544d19892ddc7.png)

## Usage
### Commands
- `/wt player <player>` – Set the player you want to whisper to
- `/wt add-group-chat <name> <members>` - Adds a new group chat
- `/wt delete-gc <name>` - Deletes a group chat
- `/wt edit-gc <members||name>` - Edits either the name or members of a group chat
- `/wt gc <name>` - Sets a group chat as whisper target
- `/wt list-groups` - Lists all groups
- `/wt tc||team-chat` - Sets your teamchat (`/teammsg`) as whisper target 

Join a group chat simply by clicking!
![Join a group chat simply by clicking!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bca35c6474dfbed4e7d3c4194878274ed8cabc70.png)

### Keybind
- Press `H` to toggle whisper mode on or off (you can change this in Keybinds settings)

### Display
- When chat is open, a small status message appears just above the chat bar showing who you're whispering to.


## Fabric API
This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
